"vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 7.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:N/VI:H/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-829", "name": "Inclusion of Functionality from Untrusted Control Sphere"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-862", "name": "Missing Authorization"}], "description": "## Summary

Channel setup catalog lookups could include untrusted workspace plugin shadows.

## Affected Packages / Versions

- Package: `openclaw`
- Ecosystem: npm
- Affected versions: `< 2026.4.10`
- Patched versions: `>= 2026.4.10`

## Impact

Channel setup could resolve a workspace plugin shadow before a bundled channel plugin, causing setup-time plugin loading without the intended trust gate.

## Technical Details

The fix routes setup catalog lookups through trusted catalog paths and uses `excludeWorkspace: true` where setup should not include workspace shadows.

## Fix

The issue was fixed in the advisory fix branch. The first stable tag containing the fix is `v2026.4.10`, and `openclaw@2026.4.14` includes the fix.

## Fix Commit(s)

- `1fede43b948df40ca8674511d4bd08d39f6c5837`
- PR: private advisory fork

## Release Process Note

Users should upgrade to `openclaw` 2026.4.10 or newer. The latest npm release, `2026.4.14`, already includes the fix.

## Credits

Thanks to @zsxsoft, with sponsorship from @KeenSecurityLab and @qclawer for reporting this issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00386, "percentile": 0.30578}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-82qx-6vj7-p8m2", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-17T21:58:46Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-82qx-6vj7-p8m2", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-82qx-6vj7-p8m2"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-43571"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-05T12:16:20Z", "published_at": "2026-04-17T21:58:46Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-82qx-6vj7-p8m2", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/1fede43b948df40ca8674511d4bd08d39f6c5837", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-43571", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-untrusted-workspace-plugin-shadow-resolution-in-channel-setup", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-82qx-6vj7-p8m2"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-82qx-6vj7-p8m2", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Channel setup catalog lookups could include untrusted workspace plugin shadows", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-08T01:32:51Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-82qx-6vj7-p8m2", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.10", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.4.10"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
